title: Create: Engineers
body: # ✅ Features - 🧠 **Create Mod** > The main feature. Adds visually driven mechanical automation. emphasizing creative contraptions over abstract systems. Build intricate, functional machines. # - 🌳 **Breathtaking Landscape** > Explore massive mountains, immersive new biomes or more detailed vanilla biomes in a new exciting adventure. # - ⭐ **Explore Aether** > Visit the OG dimension, The Aether, Sky is the limit, and you are in the skies # - ⚡ **Optimized** > Sodium, Lithium, C2ME, FerriteCore and more... Helps your game run smooth # - 🌱 **Beginner Friendly** > Quests help you guide through your play # 📊 Additional Info - 🔍Check Out **[Gallery](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-build-dreams/gallery)** For More Images - 💬Join Our **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/uSzRGWqgn3)** - ⚡Fully Optimized With Shader Support (3Gb Ram Min.) - 💡Recommended Server Hosting -> **[Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/aff.php?aff=6876)** - 📦Included projects are in version tabs; click the version. # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server?
